title: BlackBasta Ransomware — Regional Clinics Targeted
description: Active ransomware campaign targeting small healthcare providers across the Midwest United States. Initial access via phishing and unpatched Exchange servers; lateral movement via Cobalt Strike.

title: PHI Exfiltration via Misconfigured EHR APIs
description: Ongoing campaign abusing weakly authenticated FHIR endpoints on Meditech and Epic integrations to exfiltrate protected health information.

title: Exchange 2019 ProxyNotShell Variant Back in Circulation
description: Variant of ProxyNotShell (CVE-2022-41040/41082 chain) actively exploited against unpatched Exchange 2019 on-prem servers in healthcare and legal verticals.
